name: Glass Shade Table Lamp Green - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Style your space with the elegant look of this Glass Shade Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This table lamp features a brass pedestal base with a sleek body and a green pleated glass shade with scalloped edges that diffuse light for a soft, ambient glow. The three-way light setting allows you to adjust the level of lighting, and the base push button makes it easy to turn on and off.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
